docs.title: SentinelIQ SDK
docs.text:
Minimal documentation index for the SentinelIQ SDK. See the repository README and AGENTS.md for detailed guides.

  • Repository: https://github.com/killsearch/sentineliqsdk
  • Agent Guide: Refer to AGENTS.md at the project root

docs.title: Architecture Overview
docs.text: The SDK follows SOLID principles and separates concerns into core (Worker), analyzers/responders, and extractors with detectors.

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text: See DEVELOPMENT_RULES.md for development standards and workflows.

docs.title: Examples: Malware Analysis
docs.text: Add your analyzer examples under examples/analyzers/ and reference them here.

docs.title: First Analyzer
docs.text: Use poe new-analyzer -- --name MyName to scaffold. See examples/analyzers/ and AGENTS.md for runnable examples and conventions.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Install the SDK from PyPI:

pip install sentineliqsdk

Requirements: Python 3.13.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
See AGENTS.md for the complete Agent Guide. Minimal analyzer example:

from __future__ import annotations
from sentineliqsdk import Analyzer, WorkerInput

class ReputationAnalyzer(Analyzer):
    def run(self) -> None:
        observable = self.get_data()
        verdict = "malicious" if observable == "1.2.3.4" else "safe"
        tax = self.build_taxonomy(verdict, "reputation", "static", str(observable))
        self.report({"observable": observable, "verdict": verdict, "taxonomy": [tax.to_dict()]})

if __name__ == "__main__":
    ReputationAnalyzer(WorkerInput(data_type="ip", data="1.2.3.4")).run()

docs.title: Agent Guide
docs.text: For the complete agent guide, see AGENTS.md at the project root.

docs.title: API Reference: Worker
docs.text: The base class for analyzers and responders is sentineliqsdk.core.worker.Worker. Key responsibilities: - TLP/PAP validation - Proxy env setup - Error reporting with sanitized config - Hooks: summary, artifacts, operations, run

docs.title: Troubleshooting: Common Issues
docs.text:
• Lint failures: run poe lint and fix Ruff/Mypy findings.
  • Tests failing: run poe test locally; start from unit under change.

docs.title: FAQ
docs.text: Q: Como executo um exemplo? A: Execute python examples/.../example.py --help e siga as flags (--execute).

docs.title: Building Analyzers
docs.text: Follow AGENTS.md Analyzer section. Key points: - Inherit from sentineliqsdk.analyzers.Analyzer. - Implement execute() and make run() return it. - Use WorkerInput for inputs; build taxonomy and artifacts as needed.

docs.title: Building Responders
docs.text: Follow AGENTS.md Responder section. Key points: - Inherit from sentineliqsdk.responders.Responder. - Implement execute() and make run() return it. - Build operations with self.build_operation(...) and report.

docs.title: File Processing
docs.text: When data_type == "file", Analyzer.get_data() returns the filename provided in WorkerInput.filename. Handle file operations explicitly as needed.
